title: Docker Desktop alternatives that actually work on Apple Silicon
snippet: Docker Desktop has become a pain on macOS. Colima, OrbStack, Podman Desktop are all real alternatives. The resource usage of Docker Desktop is unjustifiable.
author: hn_user_leo

title: Why I replaced Docker Desktop with OrbStack and never looked back
snippet: The performance pain of Docker Desktop on Mac is legendary. OrbStack uses 90% less CPU and RAM. Docker Desktop's resource consumption was a constant pain point.
author: hn_user_mia
